description: add background tasks, agent teams, team protocols, autonomous agents onto this repo's AiAgent runtime/actor/fiber orchestrator/datagraph design, excluding persistence/restart recovery. Adopt lane/scope gating so Questionnaire suspendPolicy=pause_all blocks interactive/team but does not block background/autonomy. Runtime capabilities are implemented; remaining work focuses on terminal TUI entrypoints: primary-facing tools plus explicit `/<cmd>` prompt-template triggers for background, teams, protocols, and autonomy, with an extensible command-registry design for future Claude Code / Codex-like custom commands.
